raw_text:
```json
{
  "claims": [
    "The law aims to eliminate the barrier of high tuition expenses for low-income students in the California-Mexican border region.",
    "A 5-year pilot program will allow students who live in Mexico and within 45 miles of the California border to be exempt from out-of-state tuition rates.",
    "This law can address the demand for skilled workers and promotes a more diverse workforce and economy.",
    "The pilot program can unlock a significant untapped resource to prepare a more diverse population among the workforce.",
    "Expanding affordable access to community colleges will better equip binational students to enter the workforce."
  ]
}
```
